history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, selfie-style photo features two young individuals, a boy and a girl, with a playful and mischievous mood. Both are wearing digital filters that add cartoonish mustaches and glasses. The boy on the left, wearing a black t-shirt, has his tongue sticking out playfully and is giving a middle finger gesture with his right hand. The girl on the right, wearing a black cardigan over a white t-shirt with the word "KICK" printed in bold letters, also has her tongue sticking out. The background is dark and slightly out of focus, suggesting they might be in a dimly lit room or a cinema. The lighting is soft and appears to be coming from the front, illuminating their faces. The color palette is dominated by dark tones with some highlights on their skin and clothing. The overall style is casual and humorous, likely captured during a fun outing.
